name: subheading
label: Section Subheading
default: A selection of HubSpot projects showcasing expertise in theme development, custom integrations, and scalable CMS solutions.

children.name: description
children.label: Project Short Description
children.default: Built a fully customizable HubSpot theme for a Fortune 500 company with 50+ reusable modules, dynamic navigation, and advanced personalization features.

default.title: Enterprise CMS Theme
default.description: Built a fully customizable HubSpot theme for a Fortune 500 company with 50+ reusable modules, dynamic navigation, and advanced personalization features.

default.title: Marketing Automation Platform
default.description: Developed custom HubSpot workflows and integrations with Salesforce, Zapier, and custom APIs to automate lead nurturing and scoring processes.

default.title: SaaS Customer Portal
default.description: Created a secure customer portal within HubSpot CMS with authentication, dynamic content, and real-time data syncing from external databases.

default.title: Multi-Brand Website System
default.description: Architected a scalable multi-brand solution on HubSpot CMS allowing 12 brands to share components while maintaining unique identities and content.
